_comment: Pre-cached gallery TikToks for the landing-page 'Try these' carousel and the screenshot wall. Mix of classic manipulation, sneaky manipulation, and one control. URLs are placeholders — Lindsay and Claude will curate the final 8 in the local session tomorrow by searching current trending content. Slugs stay stable so frontend can deep-link.

picks.description: High outrage bait: moralized villain framing, ALL-CAPS indictment, rhetorical questions demanding audience anger.
High FOMO: artificial scarcity ('only X spots'), success-gap framing, comparative lifestyle anxiety.
High engagement bait: explicit 'comment X if…' / 'tag someone who…' prompts, follow-for-part-2.
High curiosity gap: 'wait for it', unresolved forward-reference, cliffhanger at max duration.
Subtle FOMO: framed as 'wellness tip' but weaponizes social comparison (implied lifestyle gap).
Subtle emotional manipulation: looks like a heartwarming share but includes a guilt-trip close ('99% will scroll past').
Subtle dopamine design: soft voice + aesthetic visuals but rapid cuts, color grading, numbered hook-reveal structure.
Low manipulation across all dimensions — e.g., an educator explaining a concept calmly with complete information and no hooks.
